# `api.partners.list`

> `GET /partner` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.partners.list() -> list[Partner]
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab partners list
```

GET /partner

## Query parameters — `PartnerListParams`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `searchText` | `Optional[str]` | no | Filter by search text |

## Response

Returns a list of `List[Partner]`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `Optional[str]` | no | Partner ID |
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Partner name |
| `type` | `Optional[str]` | no | Partner type |
| `contactInfo` | `Optional[dict]` | no | Contact information |
